title: Torque converter case Oil pump Sprocket and chain removal

blocks.text: Torque converter case Oil pump Sprocket and chain removal
1. Remove oil pump chain and oil pump sprocket
Remove the oil pump chain (A) and oil pump drive sprocket (B). Remove the sealing ring (C).
Spread the snap ring (B) under the oil pump driven sprocket (A) with snap ring pliers and lift up the oil pump driven sprocket.
Remove the oil pump driven sprocket (A) and snap ring (B).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Check that the snap ring is securely attached and inspect whether the snap ring's mounting outer diameter dimension (A) is 16.4 mm or less.
The groove of the snap ring shall be cleaned and a new snap ring shall be installed.

items.text: Check that the snap ring is securely attached and inspect whether the snap ring's mounting outer diameter dimension (A) is 16.4 mm or less.
